person.name: Meredith ap Einion ab Griffith Dwn

zh.lifeSummary: Meredith ap Einion ab Griffith Dwn是Einion ap Cadwgan Dwn Vawr的兒子，出生。他至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Meredith ap Einion ab Griffith Dwn是Einion ap Cadwgan Dwn Vawr的儿子，出生。他至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Dwn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon): topographic name for someone who lived on or near a down or low hill, from Middle English dun(e), doun(e) (Old English dūn) ‘down, low hill’. See also Downer .

English (Devon): possibly in some cases a patronymic from the Old English personal name Dūn, but later names of this origin cannot reliably be distinguished from those originating from the topographic sense. See Dunn 2.

variants.name: Downer
meanings: English (Isle of Wight, Hampshire, and Sussex): topographic name for someone who lived on a hill or down, from Middle English douner, a derivative of Middle English doun (Old English dūn) ‘hill’ + -er. It is synonymous with atte Doune (see Down ) and is a type of formation especially common in Sussex, Surrey, and Hampshire.

English: in the north-West Midlands perhaps a variant of Downward with shortening of the final syllable to -er, a habitational name probably from Downwood (Herefordshire) and perhaps also Dunwood (Staffordshire), with -wood re-etymologized as -ward and occasionally shortened to -ard. See also Downard .
Irish (Tipperary): variant of   Dooner   2.

variants.name: Dowen
meanings: English (Staffordshire): variant of   Down  .

variants.name: Durham
meanings: habitational name from the city of Durham, recorded as Dunholm in 1056 and Duram in 1297, named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ (see Down 1) + late Old English holm (from Old Norse holmr ‘island’).
variant of   Derham  .
English:

variants.name: Downes
meanings: English (Shropshire and Staffordshire): variant of Down with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish (counties Clare and Limerick): shortened Anglicized form of Irish Gaelic Ó Dubháin (see Doane ).

nameMeanings.name: Meredith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old Welsh male personal name . In recent years the name has been given to girls, especially in the United States, a choice possibly influenced by the female character so named in  Enid Bagnold's  novel National Velvet (  1935 ), which was made into a film (  1944 ).

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

nameMeanings.name: Einion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname meaning ‘anvil’.

nameMeanings.name: ab
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: probably a contracted form of  Jep , vernacular form of   Jacob   .

nameMeanings.name: Griffith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of   Gruffudd .

variants.name: Gruffudd
meanings: From Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, from an unexplained first element + a second element meaning ‘lord, prince’. Gruffydd ap Llewelyn ( d. 1063 ) was one of the most able rulers of Wales in the Middle Ages, scoring notable victories over the English until he was eventually defeated by King Harold in 1063 .

en.lifeSummary: Meredith ap Einion ab Griffith Dwn was born as the son of Einion ap Cadwgan Dwn Vawr. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Meredith ap Einion ab Griffith Dwn est né, fils d’Einion ap Cadwgan Dwn Vawr. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Meredith ap Einion ab Griffith Dwn wurde, als Sohn von Einion ap Cadwgan Dwn Vawr geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Meredith ap Einion ab Griffith Dwn è nato il come figlio di Einion ap Cadwgan Dwn Vawr. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Meredith ap Einion ab Griffith DwnはEinion ap Cadwgan Dwn Vawrの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。

pt.lifeSummary: Meredith ap Einion ab Griffith Dwn nasceu filho de Einion ap Cadwgan Dwn Vawr. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Meredith ap Einion ab Griffith Dwn родился. Его отца звали Einion ap Cadwgan Dwn Vawr. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Meredith ap Einion ab Griffith Dwn nació como hijo de Einion ap Cadwgan Dwn Vawr. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija.
